name: Hulk
description: Dr. Robert Bruce Banner, one of the foremost minds in nuclear physics and biochemistry, was transformed into the Hulk after exposure to massive doses of gamma radiation. The Hulk represents pure, unbridled rage, a being of virtually limitless strength that grows more powerful the angrier he becomes. Banner spent years as a fugitive, torn between his brilliant scientific mind and the destructive monster within. Eventually merging both personas into Professor Hulk, he became the one who could wield the Infinity Stones to undo the Snap.
